name: brainstorm-to-post-pipeline
description: Brainstorm ideas for a topic and write a social media post from the best one

input_config.human_message:
For the topic '{{topic}}', do two things:

1. Brainstorm 5 creative content angles (numbered list, one sentence each)
2. Pick the best angle and write a compelling social media post (under 280 characters)

Format your response as:
## Ideas
[numbered list]

## Post
[the post text]

topic.title: Topic
topic.description: The topic to create content about
